name: Dranas Lerano
bio:
Physical Appearance: Dunmer (Dark Elf) male equipped with leveled light armor cuirass and boots, with a chance of also wearing gauntlets, greaves, and a helmet. Armed with a leveled claymore. Holds a set of lower-class clothing - a shirt with suspenders, breeches, and clogs. Carries the key to Lelles' Quality Merchandise and a small amount of gold.
Race: Dunmer
Personality Keywords: treacherous, criminal, duplicitous
Role: Dranas Lerano is a rogue and former employee at Lelles' Quality Merchandise. Along with his companions Aenvir and Storn the Burly, he has been robbing Lelles' store regularly over the last few months.
Home Location Information: [Location information not provided in source material]
Daily Routine: Dranas loiters outside Lelles' shop until it's time to break in, which occurs between 10pm and 4am.
The Betrayal: Dranas was a trusted employee whom Norbert Lelles even allowed to open up the shop in the mornings. Despite this trust, he turned to robbing his former employer alongside his companions.
Magical Abilities: Dranas knows a leveled set of rogue spells to supplement his combat capabilities.
Personality - The Treacherous Employee: Dranas betrayed the trust of his former employer, using his insider knowledge and access to systematically rob the very shop where he once worked. His duplicity extended to being entrusted with opening the store, making his betrayal all the more shocking to Norbert Lelles.
author: Bethesda
